2603.24629.title: Sketch2Simulation: Automating Flowsheet Generation via Multi Agent Large Language Models
2603.24629.paper_summary: Converting process sketches into executable simulation models remains a major bottleneck in process systems engineering, requiring substantial manual effort and simulator-specific expertise. Recent advances in generative AI have improved both engineering-diagram interpretation and LLM-assisted flowsheet generation, but these remain largely disconnected: diagram-understanding methods often stop at extracted graphs, while text-to-simulation workflows assume structured inputs rather than raw visual artifacts. To bridge this gap, we present an end-to-end multi-agent large language model system that converts process diagrams directly into executable Aspen HYSYS flowsheets. The framework decomposes the task into three coordinated layers: diagram parsing and interpretation, simulation model synthesis, and multi-level validation. Specialized agents handle visual interpretation, graph-based intermediate representation construction, code generation for the HYSYS COM interface, execution, and structural verification. We evaluate the framework on four chemical engineering case studies of increasing complexity, from a simple desalting process to an industrial aromatic production flowsheet with multiple recycle loops. The system produces executable HYSYS models in all cases, achieving complete structural fidelity on the two simpler cases and strong performance on the more complex ones, with connection consistency above 0.93 and stream consistency above 0.96. These results demonstrate a viable end-to-end sketch-to-simulation workflow while highlighting remaining challenges in dense recycle structures, implicit diagram semantics, and simulator-interface constraints.
2603.24629.paper_summary_zh: 將過程草圖轉換為可執行的模擬模型仍然是過程系統工程中的一個主要瓶頸，這需要大量的手動努力和模擬器特定的專業知識。<lb/>最近在生成式人工智慧方面的進展改善了工程圖解釋和大型語言模型輔助的流程圖生成，但這些仍然在很大程度上是斷開的：圖解理解方法通常停留在提取的圖形上，而文本到模擬的工作流程則假設結構化的輸入，而非原始的視覺工件。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們提出了一個端到端的多代理大型語言模型系統，將過程圖直接轉換為可執行的Aspen HYSYS流程圖。<lb/>該框架將任務分解為三個協調層次：圖形解析與解釋、模擬模型合成以及多層次驗證。<lb/>專門的代理處理視覺解釋、基於圖形的中間表示構建、HYSYS COM介面的代碼生成、執行和結構驗證。<lb/>我們在四個化學工程案例研究上評估該框架，這些案例的複雜性逐漸增加，從簡單的脫鹽過程到具有多個回收迴路的工業芳香族生產流程圖。<lb/>該系統在所有案例中均生成可執行的HYSYS模型，對於兩個較簡單的案例實現了完整的結構保真度，對於更複雜的案例則表現出強勁的性能，連接一致性超過0.93，流一致性超過0.96。<lb/>這些結果展示了一個可行的端到端草圖到模擬的工作流程，同時突顯了在密集回收結構、隱含圖解語義和模擬器介面限制方面仍然存在的挑戰。
2603.24629.author: Abdullah Bahamdan et.al.
2603.24629.authors: Abdullah Bahamdan, Emma Pajak, John D. Hedengren, Antonio del Rio Chanona
